'''hakanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabdolatifolin|rabdolatifolin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabdolatifolin|rabdolatifolin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hakanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hækængæth|hækængæth]] || [[word:hækængæj|hækængæj]] || [[word:hækængæsh|hækængæsh]] || [[word:hækængæ|hækængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hakakangath|hakakangath]] || [[word:hakakangaj|hakakangaj]] || [[word:hakakangash|hakakangash]] || [[word:hakakanga|hakakanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hakangath|hakangath]] || [[word:hakangaj|hakangaj]] || [[word:hakangash|hakangash]] || [[word:hakanga|hakanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hakafngath|hakafngath]] || [[word:hakafngaj|hakafngaj]] || [[word:hakafngash|hakafngash]] || [[word:hakafngaf|hakafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hakangatha|hakangatha]] || [[word:hakangaja|hakangaja]] || [[word:hakangasha|hakangasha]] || [[word:hakangaka|hakangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hakangath|hakangath]] || [[word:hakangaj|hakangaj]] || [[word:hakangash|hakangash]] || [[word:hakanga|hakanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hakangathal|hakangathal]] || [[word:hakangajal|hakangajal]] || [[word:hakangashal|hakangashal]] || [[word:hakangakal|hakangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hakangathatha|hakangathatha]] || [[word:hakangajaja|hakangajaja]] || [[word:hakangashasha|hakangashasha]] || [[word:hakangaka|hakangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hakangathan|hakangathan]] || [[word:hakangajan|hakangajan]] || [[word:hakangashan|hakangashan]] || [[word:hakangakan|hakangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hakangathaoro|hakangathaoro]] || [[word:hakangajaoro|hakangajaoro]] || [[word:hakangashaoro|hakangashaoro]] || [[word:hakangakaoro|hakangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
